name: random-good-practises
description: A collection of good software development practices demonstrated across 6 languages

scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:python
scripts.test:go: go run Go/01_goroutines_channels.go && go run Go/02_interfaces.go && go run Go/03_context_and_embedding.go
scripts.test:java: javac Java/01_Generics.java && java GenericsExample && javac Java/02_Streams.java && java StreamsExample && javac Java/03_CompletableFuture.java && java CompletableFutureExample && javac Java/04_VirtualThreadsAndRecords.java && java VirtualThreadsAndRecords
scripts.test:php: php PHP/01_array_functions.php && php PHP/02_generators_traits.php && php PHP/03_enums_and_match.php
